brief_summary: Horizontal four-step progression: case foam → tape mod → PE foam → plate foam (optional). Steps 1-3 are filled terracotta boxes with timeline dots on a shared axis; step 4 is dashed-outline to signal it is divisive/optional. Caption surfaces the modal modern stack ('case foam + PE foam') and the iterative discipline: 'the mod that fails the test is the one to skip'.
data_sources: sound-dampening-compared.mdx § 'The stacking order most builders converge on' — 'Case foam first ... Tape mod second ... PE foam third ... Plate foam last, if more dampening is still wanted at that point'
sound-dampening-compared.mdx § 'The honest version' — 'Most builders end at two. Case foam plus PE foam is the common landing point'
sound-dampening-compared.mdx § closing — 'The mod that fails the test is the one to skip.'
